subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou Who by the light of Thy Countenance hast drawn all beings unto Thee, and by the fire of Thy Sacred Tree hast set aflame all contingent things! I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من بنور وجهک انجذبت الکائنات و بنار سدرتک اشتعلت الممکنات اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Mosaic imagery
